catalyst.event: 1H2026 interim earnings + 1.6T transceiver mass-production ramp disclosure (volume mix %, GM trajectory, hyperscaler order book commentary). Market is pricing flawless execution; any GM compression or 1.6T mix below ~30% will trigger first crack in the bull narrative.
catalyst.source: Innolight historical interim reporting cadence (late August); 1.6T ramp guidance from FY2025 annual report

rightIf_conditions: 1H2026 reported GM ≤43.5% (vs 44.0% TTM) — yield ramp pressure confirmed.
1H2026 1.6T revenue mix disclosed <30% with management lowering 2H ramp pace.
Any of NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL guides FY2026 CapEx below current consensus in their respective Q2 2026 prints (Aug 2026).
Forward P/E compresses to ≤18x within 6 months.
wrongIf_conditions: 1H2026 GM ≥44.5% AND 1.6T mix ≥35% AND management raises FY2026 revenue guidance.
New hyperscaler customer (META/AMZN/Oracle) disclosed as >10% revenue contributor, breaking concentration.
Stock breaks above 950 on volume after 1H2026 print and holds for 4 weeks — narrative reinforced, exit short.
what_changes_our_mind: 1H2026 interim print shows GM ≥44.5% AND 1.6T revenue mix ≥35% AND management discloses ≥2 new hyperscaler customers (reducing NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL concentration below 65%) — all three together would invalidate the multiple-compression thesis.
variant_view_one_sentence: Market believes Innolight delivers flawless 1.6T ramp with sustained ASP/GM premium → We believe 1H2026 GM compression + parallel competitive entry (Tower-NVDA, Coherent, CPO) trigger Davis double-kill → Mechanism is interim-print earnings revision combined with forward P/E compression from 23.5x to 16-18x.
time_to_resolution: 6 months — anchored on 2026-08-25 1H2026 interim report and Q3 2026 earnings (Oct-Nov 2026)

expected_pnl_asymmetry.downside_if_wrong: +12% (886→990 if narrative reinforced; bounded by 52W high 919 + 8% breakout)

quantification.metric_target: Forward P/E re-rating + FY2026 EPS revision
quantification.current_value: Forward P/E 23.5x; FY2026 consensus EPS implicitly ~37.7 RMB (886/23.5)
quantification.predicted_value: Forward P/E 16-18x post 1H2026 print; FY2026 EPS revised down 8-12% if GM <44%
